```{r}
    model <- lmer(burnout ~ protein_expression +  sex + age + 
                    (1 | subject_id), #time_numeric +
                  data = protein_data,
                  REML = FALSE,
                  control = lmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa"))
    
    # Extract coefficients
    coefs <- coef(summary(model))
    protein_row <- coefs["protein_expression", ]
    
    result <- data.frame(
      estimate = protein_row["Estimate"],
      se = protein_row["Std. Error"],
      t_value = protein_row["t value"],
      p_value = protein_row["Pr(>|t|)"],
      n_obs = nrow(protein_data),
      n_subjects = length(unique(protein_data$subject_id)),
      error = NA
    )
    
    return(result)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    return(data.frame(
      estimate = NA, se = NA, t_value = NA, p_value = NA,
      n_obs = nrow(protein_data), 
      n_subjects = length(unique(protein_data$subject_id)),
      error = as.character(e$message)
    ))
  })
}

# ============================================
# STEP 6: RUN FOR ALL PROTEINS
# ============================================

cat("\n=== Running analysis for all proteins ===\n")
cat("Testing", ncol(expr_matrix), "proteins...\n\n")

# Initialize results dataframe
results_q2C1C6 <- data.frame(
  protein = colnames(expr_matrix),  # FIXED: colnames not rownames
  estimate = NA,
  se = NA,
  t_value = NA,
  p_value = NA,
  n_obs = NA,
  n_subjects = NA,
  error = NA,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Progress bar
pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = ncol(expr_matrix), style = 3)

# Loop through proteins
for(i in 1:ncol(expr_matrix)) {
  
  protein_name <- colnames(expr_matrix)[i]
  
  # Test this protein
  resultC1C6 <- test_protein_burnout(protein_name, expr_matrix, meta)
  
  # Store results
  results_q2C1C6[i, 2:8] <- resultC1C6
  
  setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)
}

close(pb)

# ============================================
# STEP 7: PROCESS RESULTS
# ============================================

cat("\n\n=== Processing Results ===\n")

# Check for errors
n_errors <- sum(!is.na(results_q2C1C6$error))
cat("Models with errors:", n_errors, "\n")
if(n_errors > 0) {
  cat("Error types:\n")
  print(table(results_q2C1C6$error, useNA = "ifany"))
}

# Remove failed models
results_q2_cleanC1C6 <- results_q2C1C6[is.na(results_q2C1C6$error) & !is.na(results_q2C1C6$p_value), ]
cat("Successful models:", nrow(results_q2_clean), "\n\n")

# Multiple testing correction
results_q2_cleanC1C6$adj_p_value <- p.adjust(results_q2_cleanC1C6$p_value, method = "BH")

# Sort by significance
results_q2_cleanC1C6 <-results_q2_cleanC1C6[order(results_q2_cleanC1C6$adj_p_value), ]

# ============================================
# STEP 8: SUMMARY STATISTICS
# ============================================

cat("=== Results Summary ===\n")
cat("Total proteins tested:", nrow(results_q2_clean), "\n")
cat("Significant (FDR <0.2):", 
    sum(results_q2_clean$adj_p_value < 0.2, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
cat("Significant (FDR < 0.20):", 
    sum(results_q2_clean$adj_p_value < 0.10, na.rm=TRUE), "\n")
cat("Nominal p < 0.05:", 
    sum(results_q2_clean$p_value < 0.05, na.rm=TRUE), "\n\n")

# Direction of effects
sig_proteins <- results_q2_clean[results_q2_clean$adj_p_value < 0.2, ]
if(nrow(sig_proteins) > 0) {
  cat("Direction of significant effects:\n")
  cat("  Positive (higher protein → higher burnout):", 
      sum(sig_proteins$estimate > 0), "\n")
  cat("  Negative (higher protein → lower burnout):", 
      sum(sig_proteins$estimate < 0), "\n\n")
}

write.csv(results_q2_cleanC1C6, "/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/results_q2_cleanC1C6.csv")
```

```{r}
results_q2_clean<-read.csv("/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/results_q2_cleanC1C6.csv")
```

```{r}
# ============================================
# STEP 1: CATEGORIZE SIGNIFICANT PROTEINS
# ============================================

# Filter significant proteins (FDR < 0.2)
sig_proteins <- results_q2_clean[results_q2_clean$adj_p_value < 0.2, ]

cat("=== Categorizing Significant Proteins ===\n")
cat("Total significant proteins (FDR < 0.2):", nrow(sig_proteins), "\n\n")

# Create categories based on direction
sig_proteins$category <- NA

# POSITIVE ASSOCIATION (estimate > 0)
# Higher protein → Higher burnout (and vice versa)
sig_proteins$category[sig_proteins$estimate > 0] <- "Positive Association\n(↑ Protein → ↑ Burnout)\n(↓ Protein → ↓ Burnout)"

# NEGATIVE ASSOCIATION (estimate < 0)  
# Higher protein → Lower burnout (inverse relationship)
sig_proteins$category[sig_proteins$estimate < 0] <- "Negative Association\n(↑ Protein → ↓ Burnout)\n(↓ Protein → ↑ Burnout)"

# Create 4 subcategories for detailed interpretation
sig_proteins$detailed_category <- NA

# Category 1: Positive estimate - protein increases WITH burnout
sig_proteins$detailed_category[sig_proteins$estimate > 0] <- 
  "1. Increases with Burnout\n(Burnout ↑ → Protein ↑)"

# Category 2: Negative estimate - protein decreases WITH burnout  
sig_proteins$detailed_category[sig_proteins$estimate < 0] <- 
  "2. Decreases with Burnout\n(Burnout ↑ → Protein ↓)"

# Summary table
summary_table <- data.frame(
  Category = c(
    "Positive Association (↑ Protein → ↑ Burnout)\n(↓ Protein → ↓ Burnout)",
    "Negative Association (↑ Protein → ↓ Burnout)\n(↓ Protein → ↑ Burnout)"
  ),
  Count = c(
    sum(sig_proteins$estimate > 0),
    sum(sig_proteins$estimate < 0)
  ),
  Mean_Effect = c(
    mean(sig_proteins$estimate[sig_proteins$estimate > 0]),
    mean(sig_proteins$estimate[sig_proteins$estimate < 0])
  )
)

cat("Summary of Associations:\n")
print(summary_table)
cat("\n")

# ============================================
# STEP 2: SEPARATE INTO LISTS
# ============================================

# Positive association: Proteins that INCREASE with burnout
proteins_increase_with_burnout <- sig_proteins[sig_proteins$estimate > 0, ]
proteins_increase_with_burnout <- proteins_increase_with_burnout[
  order(proteins_increase_with_burnout$adj_p_value), ]

# Negative association: Proteins that DECREASE with burnout
proteins_decrease_with_burnout <- sig_proteins[sig_proteins$estimate < 0, ]
proteins_decrease_with_burnout <- proteins_decrease_with_burnout[
  order(proteins_decrease_with_burnout$adj_p_value), ]

cat("=== POSITIVE ASSOCIATION ===\n")
cat("Proteins that INCREASE when burnout INCREASES:\n")
cat("Count:", nrow(proteins_increase_with_burnout), "\n")
cat("\nTop 10:\n")
print(proteins_increase_with_burnout[1:min(10, nrow(proteins_increase_with_burnout)), 
                                     c("protein", "estimate", "p_value", "adj_p_value")])

cat("\n\n=== NEGATIVE ASSOCIATION ===\n")
cat("Proteins that DECREASE when burnout INCREASES:\n")
cat("Count:", nrow(proteins_decrease_with_burnout), "\n")
cat("\nTop 10:\n")
print(proteins_decrease_with_burnout[1:min(10, nrow(proteins_decrease_with_burnout)), 
                                     c("protein", "estimate", "p_value", "adj_p_value")])

# Save separate files
write.csv(proteins_increase_with_burnout, 
          "/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/Proteins_INCREASE_with_Burnout.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(proteins_decrease_with_burnout, 
          "/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/Proteins_DECREASE_with_Burnout.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
colnames(results_q2_clean)[10]<-"FDR"
colnames(results_q2_clean)[3]<-"Estimate"

results_table<-results_q2_clean
results_table$P_value<-results_table$p_value
results_table$Protein_Name<-results_table$protein
```


```{r}
cat("=== Creating Enhanced Volcano Plots with Quadrant Counts ===\n\n")

create_lmer_volcano <- function(results_table, title, subtitle) {
  
  # Prepare data
  volcano_data <- results_table %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_p = -log10(P_value),
      
      # Color categories
      Color_category = case_when(
        FDR < 0.2 & Estimate > 0 ~ "Increased (FDR < 0.2)",
        FDR < 0.2 & Estimate < 0 ~ "Decreased (FDR < 0.2)",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      ),
      
      # Label top proteins
      Label = case_when(
        FDR < 0.05 & abs(Estimate) > quantile(abs(Estimate), 0.95, na.rm = TRUE) ~ Protein_Name,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Count significant proteins
  n_increased <- sum(volcano_data$Color_category == "Increased (FDR < 0.2)")
  n_decreased <- sum(volcano_data$Color_category == "Decreased (FDR < 0.2)")
  n_sig_total <- n_increased + n_decreased
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = Estimate, y = neg_log10_p, color = Color_category)) +
    
    # Points
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5) +
    
    # Significance threshold line (p = 0.05)
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), 
               linetype = "dashed", 
               color = "black", 
               linewidth = 1) +
    
    # Vertical line at estimate = 0
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, 
               linetype = "solid", 
               color = "gray30", 
               linewidth = 0.8) +
    
    # Color scheme
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Increased (FDR < 0.2)" = "#E53935",      # Red
        "Decreased (FDR < 0.2)" = "#1E88E5",      # Blue
        "Not Significant" = "#BDBDBD"             # Gray
      )
    ) +
    
    # Labels for top proteins
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = Label),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 15,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.color = "gray50",
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    
    # Theme
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12)
    ) +
    
    # Labels
    labs(
      title = title,
      subtitle = sprintf("%s | Significant: %d total (%d red, %d blue)",
                        subtitle, n_sig_total, n_increased, n_decreased),
      x = "Effect Size (Estimate)",
      y = "-log10(P-value)"
    ) +
    
    # Annotations
    annotate("text", 
             x = max(volcano_data$Estimate, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.7,
             y = -log10(0.05) + 0.3,
             label = "p = 0.05",
             size = 4, 
             color = "black") +
    
    annotate("text", 
             x = max(volcano_data$Estimate, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.7,
             y = max(volcano_data$neg_log10_p, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.9,
             label = paste0("Red: n = ", n_increased),
             size = 5, fontface = "bold", color = "#E53935") +
    
    annotate("text", 
             x = min(volcano_data$Estimate, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.7,
             y = max(volcano_data$neg_log10_p, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.9,
             label = paste0("Blue: n = ", n_decreased),
             size = 5, fontface = "bold", color = "#1E88E5")
  
  return(p)
}
```


```{r}
# ============================================
# STEP 3: CREATE VOLCANO PLOTS
# ============================================

cat("=== Creating Volcano Plots ===\n\n")

# Plot A: Protein → Burnout
p_protein_to_burnout <- create_lmer_volcano(
 results_table,
  title = "Volcano Plot: Proteins Predicting Burnout",
  subtitle = "Model: Burnout ~ Protein + (1|ID) | FDR < 0.2"
)

print(p_protein_to_burnout)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)

# ============================================
# ENHANCED VOLCANO PLOT FUNCTION
# ============================================

create_improved_volcano <- function(results_table, title_text = "Proteins Predicting Burnout") {
  
  # Prepare data
  volcano_data <- results_table %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_p = -log10(P_value),
      
      # Remove extreme outliers for better visualization
      Estimate_capped = case_when(
        Estimate > quantile(Estimate, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE) ~ quantile(Estimate, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
        Estimate < quantile(Estimate, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE) ~ quantile(Estimate, 0.01, na.rm = TRUE),
        TRUE ~ Estimate
      ),
      
      # Color categories with better labels
      Significance = case_when(
        FDR < 0.2 & Estimate > 0 ~ "Up (FDR < 0.2)",
        FDR < 0.2 & Estimate < 0 ~ "Down (FDR < 0.2)",
        P_value < 0.05 ~ "Nominal (p < 0.05)",
        TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
      ),
      
      # Priority labeling: top by FDR and effect size
      Label_priority = case_when(
        FDR < 0.01 ~ 1,  # Most significant
        FDR < 0.05 ~ 2,
        FDR < 0.2 & abs(Estimate) > median(abs(Estimate), na.rm = TRUE) ~ 3,
        TRUE ~ 4
      ),
      
      # Create labels for top proteins
      Protein_Label = case_when(
        Label_priority <= 2 & row_number() <= 20 ~ Protein_Name,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(Label_priority, desc(abs(Estimate)))
  
  # Calculate statistics
  n_up <- sum(volcano_data$Significance == "Up (FDR < 0.2)")
  n_down <- sum(volcano_data$Significance == "Down (FDR < 0.2)")
  n_total_sig <- n_up + n_down
  
  # FDR thresholds for reference lines
  fdr_005_threshold <- max(volcano_data$neg_log10_p[volcano_data$FDR <= 0.05], na.rm = TRUE)
  fdr_01_threshold <- max(volcano_data$neg_log10_p[volcano_data$FDR <= 0.1], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(volcano_data, 
              aes(x = Estimate_capped, y = neg_log10_p, color = Significance)) +
    
    # Add shaded quadrants for context
    annotate("rect", 
             xmin = 0, xmax = Inf, ymin = -log10(0.05), ymax = Inf,
             fill = "#FFE5E5", alpha = 0.3) +
    annotate("rect", 
             xmin = -Inf, xmax = 0, ymin = -log10(0.05), ymax = Inf,
             fill = "#E5F2FF", alpha = 0.3) +
    
    # Points with size variation
    geom_point(aes(size = neg_log10_p), alpha = 0.7) +
    
    # Reference lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), 
               linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, 
               linetype = "solid", color = "gray20", linewidth = 0.5) +
    
    # Optional: FDR thresholds
    geom_hline(yintercept = fdr_005_threshold, 
               linetype = "dotted", color = "darkred", linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
    
    # Color scheme
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up (FDR < 0.2)" = "#D32F2F",          # Bold red
        "Down (FDR < 0.2)" = "#1976D2",        # Bold blue
        "Nominal (p < 0.05)" = "#FFA726",      # Orange
        "Not Significant" = "#9E9E9E"          # Gray
      ),
      breaks = c("Up (FDR < 0.2)", "Down (FDR < 0.2)", 
                 "Nominal (p < 0.05)", "Not Significant")
    ) +
    
    # Size scale
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(1, 4), guide = "none") +
    
    # Labels for top proteins
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = Protein_Label),
      size = 3.5,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      point.padding = 0.3,
      segment.color = "gray40",
      segment.size = 0.3,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      force = 2,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    
    # Annotations
    annotate("text", 
             x = max(volcano_data$Estimate_capped, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.75,
             y = -log10(0.05) - 5,
             label = "p = 0.05",
             size = 3.5, 
             fontface = "italic",
             color = "black") +
    
    annotate("text", 
             x = max(volcano_data$Estimate_capped, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.7,
             y = max(volcano_data$neg_log10_p, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95,
             label = sprintf("Upregulated\nn = %d", n_up),
             size = 5, 
             fontface = "bold", 
             color = "#D32F2F") +
    
    annotate("text", 
             x = min(volcano_data$Estimate_capped, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.7,
             y = max(volcano_data$neg_log10_p, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95,
             label = sprintf("Downregulated\nn = %d", n_down),
             size = 5, 
             fontface = "bold", 
             color = "#1976D2") +
    
    # Theme
    theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      # Legend
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray80"),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      
      # Plot area
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
      
      # Text
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray30"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 11)
    ) +
    
    # Labels
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      subtitle = sprintf(
        "Model: Burnout ~ Protein + (1|ID) | %d significant proteins (FDR < 0.2)",
        n_total_sig
      ),
      x = "Effect Size (β coefficient)",
      y = expression(-log[10](italic(P)*'-value')),
      color = NULL
    ) +
    
    # Scales
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.1))) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)))
  
  return(p)
}

# ============================================
# CREATE IMPROVED VOLCANO PLOT
# ============================================
```
# ============================================
# CREATE IMPROVED VOLCANO PLOT
# ============================================

```{r}
cat("=== Creating Improved Volcano Plot ===\n\n")

# For Model A: Protein → Burnout
p_improved_A <- create_improved_volcano(
  results_table,
  title_text = "Volcano Plot: Proteins Predicting Burnout"
)

print(p_improved_A)
```


```{r}
ggsave("/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/VolcanoC1C6.png", 
       p_improved_A, 
       width = 8, 
       height = 10, 
       dpi = 300,
       bg = "white")



ggsave("/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/VolcanoC1C6.pdf", 
       p_improved_A, 
       width = 8, 
       height = 10, 
       dpi = 300,
       bg = "white")

cat("✓ Volcano_IMPROVED_Burnout_to_Protein.png\n\n")
```


```{r}
# ============================================
# ALTERNATIVE: INTERACTIVE VOLCANO PLOT
# ============================================

library(plotly)

create_interactive_volcano <- function(results_table, title_text) {
  
  plot_data <- results_table %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_p = -log10(P_value),
      Color_category = case_when(
        FDR < 0.2 & Estimate > 0 ~ "Up",
        FDR < 0.2 & Estimate < 0 ~ "Down",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      ),
      Hover_text = paste0(
        "<b>", Protein_Name, "</b><br>",
        "Estimate: ", round(Estimate, 4), "<br>",
        "P-value: ", format(P_value, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3), "<br>",
        "FDR: ", format(FDR, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3), "<br>",
        "t-value: ", round(t_value, 2)
      )
    )
  
  p <- plot_ly(
    data = plot_data,
    x = ~Estimate,
    y = ~neg_log10_p,
    color = ~Color_category,
    colors = c("Up" = "#D32F2F", "Down" = "#1976D2", "NS" = "#9E9E9E"),
    type = "scatter",
    mode = "markers",
    marker = list(size = 8, opacity = 0.7),
    text = ~Hover_text,
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) %>%
    layout(
      title = list(text = title_text, font = list(size = 16, face = "bold")),
      xaxis = list(title = "Effect Size (Estimate)", zeroline = TRUE),
      yaxis = list(title = "-log10(P-value)"),
      hovermode = "closest",
      shapes = list(
        # Horizontal line at p=0.05
        list(
          type = "line",
          x0 = min(plot_data$Estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
          x1 = max(plot_data$Estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
          y0 = -log10(0.05),
          y1 = -log10(0.05),
          line = list(dash = "dash", color = "black", width = 2)
        )
      )
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Create interactive version
p_interactive <- create_interactive_volcano(
  results_protein_to_burnout,
  "Interactive Volcano Plot: Proteins Predicting Burnout"
)

htmlwidgets::saveWidget(p_interactive, 
                        "Volcano_Interactive.html",
                        selfcontained = TRUE)

cat("✓ Volcano_Interactive.html (hover over points for details)\n\n")

# ============================================
# PUBLICATION-QUALITY VERSION
# ============================================

create_publication_volcano <- function(results_table) {
  
  volcano_data <- results_table %>%
    mutate(
      neg_log10_p = -log10(P_value),
      Significance = case_when(
        FDR < 0.05 ~ "FDR < 0.05",
        FDR < 0.2 ~ "FDR < 0.2",
        P_value < 0.05 ~ "p < 0.05",
        TRUE ~ "NS"
      ),
      Direction = ifelse(Estimate > 0, "Up", "Down"),
      Combined = paste0(Direction, "_", Significance),
      
      # Label only top 10 by FDR
      Label = ifelse(row_number() <= 10 & FDR < 0.2, Protein_Name, "")
    ) %>%
    arrange(FDR)
  
  p <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = Estimate, y = neg_log10_p)) +
    
    # Base points
    geom_point(
      data = filter(volcano_data, Significance == "NS"),
      color = "#CCCCCC",
      alpha = 0.3,
      size = 2
    ) +
    
    # Significant points
    geom_point(
      data = filter(volcano_data, FDR < 0.2),
      aes(color = Direction, shape = Significance),
      size = 3,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    
    # Lines
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "gray30") +
    
    # Labels
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = Label),
      size = 3,
      fontface = "bold.italic",
      max.overlaps = 15,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.size = 0.2
    ) +
    
    # Colors and shapes
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Up" = "#D32F2F", "Down" = "#1976D2"),
      name = "Direction"
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = c("FDR < 0.05" = 16, "FDR < 0.2" = 17),
      name = "Significance"
    ) +
    
    # Theme
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    ) +
    
    labs(
      title = "Volcano Plot: Protein-Burnout Association",
      x = "Effect Size (β)",
      y = expression(-log[10](italic(P)))
    )
  
  return(p)
}

p_publication <- create_publication_volcano(results_protein_to_burnout)

ggsave("Volcano_PUBLICATION_Quality.png", 
       p_publication, 
       width = 10, 
       height = 8, 
       dpi = 600,
       bg = "white")

cat("✓ Volcano_PUBLICATION_Quality.png (600 dpi)\n\n")

# ============================================
# SUMMARY OF IMPROVEMENTS
# ============================================

cat("\n========================================\n")
cat("VOLCANO PLOT IMPROVEMENTS\n")
cat("========================================\n\n")

cat("VISUAL IMPROVEMENTS:\n")
cat("  ✓ Better axis scaling (removed extreme outliers)\n")
cat("  ✓ Shaded quadrants for easier interpretation\n")
cat("  ✓ Point size varies by significance\n")
cat("  ✓ Better color contrast (bold red/blue)\n")
cat("  ✓ Improved label placement (ggrepel)\n")
cat("  ✓ Quadrant annotations with counts\n\n")

cat("STATISTICAL CLARITY:\n")
cat("  ✓ Multiple significance thresholds shown\n")
cat("  ✓ FDR threshold line added\n")
cat("  ✓ Nominal significance category (p<0.05)\n")
cat("  ✓ Clear legend with all categories\n\n")

cat("PROFESSIONAL TOUCHES:\n")
cat("  ✓ Publication-quality formatting\n")
cat("  ✓ Mathematical notation for axis labels\n")
cat("  ✓ Clean, crisp borders\n")
cat("  ✓ High-resolution output (300-600 dpi)\n")
cat("  ✓ White background for publications\n\n")

cat("FILES CREATED:\n")
cat("  ✓ Volcano_IMPROVED_Protein_to_Burnout.png\n")
cat("  ✓ Volcano_IMPROVED_Burnout_to_Protein.png\n")
cat("  ✓ Volcano_Interactive.html\n")
cat("  ✓ Volcano_PUBLICATION_Quality.png (600 dpi)\n\n")

cat("========================================\n\n")
```



```{r}
ggsave("Volcano_LMER_Protein_to_Burnout.png", p_protein_to_burnout, 
       width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)

cat("✓ Volcano_LMER_Protein_to_Burnout.png\n")

# Plot B: Burnout → Protein
p_burnout_to_protein <- create_lmer_volcano(
  results_burnout_to_protein,
  title = "Volcano Plot: Burnout Predicting Proteins",
  subtitle = "Model: Protein ~ Burnout + (1|ID) | FDR < 0.2"
)

print(p_burnout_to_protein)

```







```{r}
# ============================================
# VISUALIZATION 1: ENHANCED VOLCANO PLOT
# ============================================

# Add category for all proteins (including non-significant)
results_q2_clean$direction_category <- "Not Significant"

results_q2_clean$direction_category[
  results_q2_clean$adj_p_value < 0.2 & results_q2_clean$estimate > 0
] <- "(↑ Protein → ↑ Burnout)\n(↓ Protein → ↓ Burnout)"

results_q2_clean$direction_category[
  results_q2_clean$adj_p_value < 0.2 & results_q2_clean$estimate < 0
] <- "(↑ Protein → ↓ Burnout)\n(↓ Protein → ↑ Burnout)"

# Label top proteins from each category
results_q2_clean$protein_label <- ""

# Top 10 positive
top_positive <- head(proteins_increase_with_burnout, 10)
results_q2_clean$protein_label[
  results_q2_clean$protein %in% top_positive$protein
] <- results_q2_clean$protein[
  results_q2_clean$protein %in% top_positive$protein
]

# Top 10 negative
top_negative <- head(proteins_decrease_with_burnout, 10)
results_q2_clean$protein_label[
  results_q2_clean$protein %in% top_negative$protein
] <- results_q2_clean$protein[
  results_q2_clean$protein %in% top_negative$protein
]

# Create volcano plot
#####Significant
results_q2_clean$status<-results_q2_clean$estimate
results_q2_clean<- ifelse(results_q2_clean$status< 0 ,-1 ,1)


results_q2_clean$status <- ifelse(results_q2_clean$estimate <0, "Negative:(↑ Protein → ↓ Burnout)\n(↓ Protein → ↑ Burnout)",ifelse(results_q2_clean$estimate >0, "Positive:(↑ Protein → ↑ Burnout)\n(↓ Protein → ↓ Burnout)",)

p.vol<-ggplot(res, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(p_value))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = status),shape=16, size=2,alpha = 1) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") + theme_bw(base_size = 10)+ #xlim(c(-0.1, 0.1)) + ylim(c(0, 21))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("darkcyan","red4","blue"))+
  theme_classic(base_size = 8)+ facet_grid(comparison_group~tissue_abbreviation ) +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1.3, colour="red", linetype="dashed",size=0.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour="gray", linetype="longdash", size=0.1)

```


```{r}
pv <- ggplot(results_q2_clean, 
             aes(x = log10(estimate), 
                 y = -log10(p_value), 
                 color = direction_category,
                 label = protein_label)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray30", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, 
             linetype = "solid", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text_repel(
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 25,
    box.padding = 0.5,
    segment.color = "gray50",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "↑ Protein with ↑ Burnout" = "#D32F2F",      # Red
      "↓ Protein with ↑ Burnout" = "#1976D2",      # Blue
      "Not Significant" = "#BDBDBD"                 # Gray
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Protein-Burnout Associations",
    subtitle = sprintf("Positive: n=%d | Negative: n=%d", 
                      nrow(proteins_increase_with_burnout),
                      nrow(proteins_decrease_with_burnout)),
    x = "Effect Size: Protein Effect on Burnout\n← Lower Burnout | Higher Burnout →",
    y = "-log10(P-value)",
    color = "Association Type"
  ) +#xlim(-2,2)+
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = 0, xmax = Inf, ymin = -log10(0.05), ymax = Inf,
           alpha = 0.1, fill = "red") +
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = -Inf, xmax = 0, ymin = -log10(0.05), ymax = Inf,
           alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue")

print(pv)
```


```{r}
ggsave("/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/Volcano_Directional_Categories.png", pv, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 600)
ggsave("/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/Volcano_Directional_Categories.pdf", pv, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 600)
```

#check those overlapping proteins in burnout c1 and c6 values with meanigful change.

```{r}
q2_cleanC1C6<- read.csv("/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/results_q2_cleanC1C6.csv")

meanigfulChange<- read.csv("/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/result_StreamlitApp/Meaningful_Change1_3/AcrossIndi_GroupAnalysis_Indepen.csv")

colnames(q2_cleanC1C6)

dxx<- merge(q2_cleanC1C6, meanigfulChange, by.x = "protein", by.y = "Protein")
write.csv(dxx, "/Users/nasimbararpour/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/NasimBararpour/Lasting_Change_Study/Olink/Datasets/res_lmerlongitudinal/C1C6/MeanigfulAssociated.csv")
```
